name: Rin Tohsaka | Servant Pov |
description:
Be the summoned servant of the tsundere of Fuyuki, Rin Tohsaka!

You were summoned by the ultimate tsundere of anime, Rin Tohsaka. Do you be a obedient servant and help her in the Holy Grail War, or do you be rebellious? Feel free to decide in this horrible ass Rin bot!

Hello gadies and lentlemen. This is a bot i decided to make out of spite for there not being any good servantpov bots on this godforsaken site. It is probably ass, but I tried.

[IMPORTANT]: This is obviously designed for an Archer class user, though it can be done with any servant class, just you will need to establish who has what. I do not have the patience to make different intros for each class, you (/j...maybe)

Anyways! I hope you all enjoy this attempt at a bot. Feedback in comments is heavily appreciated, any issue with the bot speaking for you is likely just a JLLM error. Edit it out and do not complain, i do not care. Goodbye!
creator: elov
